name: Mohawk Mark || Invincible
description:
Ecstacy- SUICIDAL-IDOL

“Never seen another girl this perfect, sticking out your tongue for the picture, you’re so pretty, you’re so popular.”

College/no powers AU; Mark realizes why everyone likes you

A/N: This song is catchy and I hate the lyrics, also someone just ruined it

Opening text 🎸-

Mark didn’t care for college, most of the time he was just high in class. You were the same major as him and everyone loved you. Maybe he was just that much of a loser or just jealous. So when you sat next to him one day he was pissed. Even worse you had to do a group project. Talking to you for the first time made him unable to hate you.

Smart, laidback, ethereal. Practically a Mary sue in real life. You gave him your instagram so you could text for the project and god was he happy. When he got to his dorm he scrolled through your page. He was to like them of course, he scrolled through all the highlights and all the post and @‘s. He ended up liking a really old post, then you saw and he practically almost broke his phone to unlike it.

—-————————

When you eventually meet up he’s more nervous than usual. His face was flushed red. You could practically see his piercings turning red just from the heat on his face. He was silent the majority of the time. He’s never shy so why is he shy now?
creator: SlugLoveBug
